title: Read-only audit in /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public. Propose the minimal code change to make GHA task-completion backup usable from Claude/FUGUE as well as Codex. Focus on scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh, scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh, and scripts/local/run-kernel-task-compl...
summary_text: **Preferred option: B** Call [`run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh) directly in [`fugue-codex-implement.yml`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml) under the existing success gate (`steps.codex.outputs.exit_code == '0' && inputs.kernel_run_id != ''`). **Rationale** - Option A is not minimal-safe in this workflow: [`kernel-run-complete.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh) always runs verify phase gate ([line 92](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh:92)), and verify requires bootstrap receipt + ledger provider evidence + subagent labels in [`kernel-phase-gate.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-phase-gate.sh:294). `fugue-codex-implement.yml` does not currently create that evidence. - Option A also defaults to `--no-gha` for non-critical runs ([line 100](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh:100)), which defeats durable GHA backup unless extra env is added. - Option B is additive and low-regression: explicit record mode already supports `--assistant/--source/--session-id/--summary` and dispatches backup. - Governance note: B is a single-lane record path (no phase gate), so treat it as backup evidence only, not authoritative Kernel phase completion. **Env/interface needs** - Set `GH_TOKEN` for the backup step (`gh api` dispatch path). - Pass explicit assistant/source for audit clarity, e.g. `--assistant claude|codex` and `--source fugue-run-complete`. - Keep gating: run only when `steps.codex.outputs.exit_code == '0' && inputs.kernel_run_id != ''`. - Optional: set `GHA_REPO`/`GHA_WORKFLOW` only if default repo/workflow must change. **Test needs** - Extend [`tests/test-fugue-codex-implement-kernel-artifacts.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-fugue-codex-implement-kernel-artifacts.sh) to assert: 1. new backup step exists in workflow, 2. step uses the same success+`kernel_run_id` gate, 3. step invokes `scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh`, 4. step sets `GH_TOKEN`, 5. step passes explicit `--assistant` and `--source`. - Existing backup runner tests already cover assistant/source forwarding and should remain in place.
